title: Legacy Utils
description: Legacy Utils is a client side mod that adds solvers and helpful features to assist you in all aspects of Legacy Lore.
body:
Hello everyone! I’ve been working on this project for about a month and I’m excited to finally share it: Legacy Utils is a client-side mod that adds solvers and helpful features to assist you in most aspects of Legacy Lore.

Features:

Info menu (for each door in 101 Halls)

Blue Binary solver

Ingenuity solver

Honey Maze solver

LightsOut solver (all variations)

7x7 solver

Water Maze trails (pickaxe, boss room, and conduits)

Dungeon trails (all lamps and wind charge)

Spirit trails (M2.5 and M3 included)

GUI menu and rendering for solvers

If you have suggestions for new features or spot any bugs, feel free to DM me on discord @dappls. I’d love to hear your feedback!
